# Appendix B: Oilfield Abbreviation Glossary {#sec-appendix-b .unnumbered}

This glossary supports Chapter 2's abbreviation expansion engine and the
Chapter 2 challenge exercise. It is not exhaustive — abbreviation usage
varies by operator, rig contractor, and basin — but covers the
terms used throughout this book's sample DDRs, plus enough additional
common terms to give the expander real coverage on a first pass against
your own archive.

| Abbreviation | Expansion |
|---|---|
| BHA | bottom hole assembly |
| BOP | blowout preventer |
| CBL | cement bond log |
| CIRC | circulate |
| COND | condition |
| CSG | casing |
| DHSV | downhole safety valve |
| DP | drill pipe |
| ECD | equivalent circulating density |
| EMW | equivalent mud weight |
| FIT | formation integrity test |
| FR | from |
| GPM | gallons per minute |
| KOP | kick-off point |
| LOT | leak-off test |
| MD | measured depth |
| MIRU | move in, rig up |
| MW | mud weight |
| NPT | non-productive time |
| OBSD | observed |
| PBTD | plugged back total depth |
| POOH | pull out of hole |
| PPG | pounds per gallon |
| PU | pick up (pipe) |
| PUW | pick up weight |
| RIH | run in hole |
| ROP | rate of penetration |
| RPM | revolutions per minute |
| SICP | shut-in casing pressure |
| SIDPP | shut-in drill pipe pressure |
| SLM | slow (rate), or short for "slim hole" depending on context — verify against operator style guide |
| STDS | stands (of drill pipe) |
| STK | stuck |
| TD | total depth |
| TIH | trip in hole |
| TOOH | trip out of hole |
| TVD | true vertical depth |
| WOB | weight on bit |
| WOC | wait on cement |
| WOW | wait on weather |
| XO | crossover (sub) |

::: {.callout-warning title="Abbreviations are not universal"}
The same three letters can mean different things across operators and
basins — build your abbreviation dictionary from *your* archive's actual
usage before trusting it against your own reports, and treat any
ambiguous abbreviation (like `SLM` above) as a signal to check context
rather than expand automatically.
:::
